title: OpenAI ships Sora to ChatGPT Plus and Pro
summary: Sora's text-to-video model rolled out to paid ChatGPT users, with longer clip durations and a new storyboard editor for stitching scenes together.

title: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7 with longer context
summary: Claude's flagship model gets stronger long-document reasoning and faster artifact generation, available now in claude.ai and the API.

title: ElevenLabs launches real-time voice agents
summary: Conversational voice agents with sub-500ms latency now ship as a hosted product, targeting customer support and in-app assistants.

title: Runway's Gen-4 brings character consistency to video
summary: Runway's new model preserves characters and props across shots, closing a key gap with traditional VFX pipelines.

title: Cursor passes 1M paying developers
summary: The AI-first editor reports a milestone driven by its multi-file agent and faster apply, with enterprise rollouts now its fastest segment.

title: Google rolls Gemini deeper into Workspace
summary: Gemini side panel is now standard in Docs, Sheets, and Gmail for all paid Workspace tiers, with new agentic actions across files.

title: Suno v5 ships with stem separation
summary: Suno's latest model produces longer songs and exposes individual stems, making outputs editable in standard DAWs.

title: Midjourney V7 focuses on photorealism and editing
summary: V7 introduces in-canvas editing, better hands and text, and a new style library tuned for product and commercial work.

title: Perplexity launches Spaces for team research
summary: Spaces let teams share collections of sources, prompts, and threads — a research-focused answer to ChatGPT Projects.

title: Hugging Face crosses 2M public models
summary: The hub passes a milestone amid a wave of open releases in vision-language and small language models tuned for on-device use.
